message:
feat(abi): delegate ether_ntohost, ether_hostton, and ether_line to host libc via runtime dlsym

- Replace native stub implementations of ether_ntohost(), ether_hostton(),
  and ether_line() with runtime dlsym delegation via resolve_host_symbol_raw(),
  continuing the pattern of moving NSS/ethers lookups from compile-time
  stubs to runtime host delegation for glibc behavior fidelity
- All three functions retain the -1 fallback when the host symbol is
  unavailable, matching existing behavior on minimal systems
- Update ABI tests to cover the new delegation paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
